In fact, it was the Obama administration that
[paused funding]for high-risk GoF studies in 2014. The ban[was lifted]by none other than Donald Trump in 2017. At the time, outlets like[Scientific American]and[Science]covered the decision, in articles that quoted scientists talking about what could go wrong. Remind yourself of this the next time you see rightists trumpeting some headline showing the media being wrong about something.
That is [from Richard Hanania's Substack](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b3a8008fac8b99dfc94cd165f5ce8ef290fd93a5c3694556156b40cdc15c4337&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90651&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=4a5437fb4607a219147621e1179ed0b1&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=4e9b2bf48798f8c6d97ee6b4276bbd20).
